tEn: Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm
tZh: 通过通用强化学习算法的自我对弈掌握国际象棋和将棋
sEn: AlphaZero achieves superhuman performance in chess, shogi, and Go through self-play reinforcement learning with no domain knowledge beyond game rules.
sZh: AlphaZero通过自我对弈强化学习，在仅知游戏规则而无领域知识的情况下，在国际象棋、将棋和围棋中达到超人类水平。
absEn: The game of chess is the most widely-studied domain in the history of artificial intelligence. The strongest programs are based on a combination of sophisticated search techniques, domain-specific adaptations, and handcrafted evaluation functions that have been refined by human experts over several decades. In contrast, the AlphaGo Zero program recently achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by tabula rasa reinforcement learning from games of self-play. In this paper, we generalise this approach into a single AlphaZero algorithm that can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance in many challenging domains. Starting from random play, and given no domain knowledge except the game rules, AlphaZero achieved within 24 hours a superhuman level of play in the games of chess and shogi (Japanese chess) as well as Go, and convincingly defeated a world-champion program in each case.
absZh: 国际象棋是人工智能历史上研究最广泛的领域。最强的程序基于复杂搜索技术、领域特定调整和人类专家数十年来精心设计的评估函数的结合。相比之下，AlphaGo Zero程序最近通过从自我对弈游戏中进行的无先验知识强化学习，在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们将这种方法推广为一个单一的AlphaZero算法，该算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过无先验知识学习达到超人类表现。从随机对弈开始，除了游戏规则外没有任何领域知识，AlphaZero在24小时内就在国际象棋、将棋（日本象棋）以及围棋中达到了超人类水平，并在每种情况下令人信服地击败了世界冠军程序。

contrib.en: Proposes AlphaZero, a single algorithm achieving superhuman play in chess, shogi, and Go via tabula rasa reinforcement learning.
contrib.zh: 提出AlphaZero，一个通过从零开始的强化学习在象棋、将棋和围棋中实现超人类水平的单一算法。

contrib.en: Uses deep neural networks and Monte-Carlo tree search without domain-specific knowledge beyond game rules.
contrib.zh: 使用深度神经网络和蒙特卡洛树搜索，除游戏规则外无需领域特定知识。

contrib.en: Defeats world-champion programs Stockfish, Elmo, and AlphaGo Zero in 100-game matches with zero losses in chess.
contrib.zh: 在100局比赛中击败世界冠军程序Stockfish、Elmo和AlphaGo Zero，象棋中零败。

contrib.en: Demonstrates MCTS scales more effectively with thinking time than alpha-beta search in chess and shogi.
contrib.zh: 证明MCTS在象棋和将棋中随思考时间的扩展效果优于alpha-beta搜索。

contrib.en: Discovers and plays common human chess openings independently during self-play training.
contrib.zh: 在自我对弈训练中独立发现并下出常见的人类象棋开局。

contrib.en: Provides a general framework applicable to multiple games without hyper-parameter tuning.
contrib.zh: 提供无需超参数调优即可适用于多种游戏的通用框架。

limits.en: Requires perfect knowledge of game rules for MCTS simulations and input encoding.
limits.zh: 需要游戏规则的完美知识用于MCTS模拟和输入编码。

limits.en: Neural network architecture may not suit games with asymmetric rules or long-range interactions.
limits.zh: 神经网络架构可能不适合具有不对称规则或长程交互的游戏。

limits.en: Training requires massive computational resources (5000 TPUs for self-play, 64 for training).
limits.zh: 训练需要大量计算资源（5000个TPU用于自我对弈，64个用于训练）。

limits.en: Does not incorporate domain-specific enhancements like opening books or endgame tablebases.
limits.zh: 未整合领域特定增强，如开局库或残局数据库。

limits.en: Performance may degrade in games with draws or non-binary outcomes due to expected outcome optimization.
limits.zh: 在平局或非二元结果的游戏中，由于期望结果优化，性能可能下降。

paras.en: The game of chess is the most widely-studied domain in the history of artificial intelligence. The strongest programs are based on a combination of sophisticated search techniques, domain-specific adaptations, and handcrafted evaluation functions that have been refined by human experts over several decades. In contrast, the AlphaGo Zero program recently achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by tabula rasa reinforcement learning from games of self-play. In this paper, we generalise this approach into a single AlphaZero algorithm that can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance in many challenging domains. Starting from random play, and given no domain knowledge except the game rules, AlphaZero achieved within 24 hours a superhuman level of play in the games of chess and shogi (Japanese chess) as well as Go, and convincingly defeated a world-champion program in each case.
paras.zh: 国际象棋是人工智能历史上研究最广泛的领域。最强的程序基于复杂搜索技术、领域特定调整以及由人类专家数十年精心设计的评估函数的组合。相比之下，AlphaGo Zero 程序最近通过自我对弈的强化学习，在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们将这种方法推广为一个单一的 AlphaZero 算法，该算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过零基础强化学习实现超人类表现。从随机对弈开始，除了游戏规则外没有领域知识，AlphaZero 在 24 小时内就在国际象棋、日本将棋以及围棋中达到了超人类水平，并在每种情况下令人信服地击败了世界冠军程序。

paras.en: The study of computer chess is as old as computer science itself. Babbage, Turing, Shannon, and von Neumann devised hardware, algorithms and theory to analyse and play the game of chess. Chess subsequently became the grand challenge task for a generation of artificial intelligence researchers, culminating in high-performance computer chess programs that perform at superhuman level (?, ?). However, these systems are highly tuned to their domain, and cannot be generalised to other problems without significant human effort.
paras.zh: 计算机象棋的研究与计算机科学本身一样古老。巴贝奇、图灵、香农和冯·诺依曼设计了硬件、算法和理论来分析和下国际象棋。国际象棋随后成为一代人工智能研究者的重大挑战任务，最终产生了达到超人类水平的高性能计算机象棋程序（?, ?）。然而，这些系统高度针对其领域进行调整，无法在没有大量人力投入的情况下推广到其他问题。

paras.en: A long-standing ambition of artificial intelligence has been to create programs that can instead learn for themselves from first principles (?). Recently, the AlphaGo Zero algorithm achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by representing Go knowledge using deep convolutional neural networks (?, ?), trained solely by reinforcement learning from games of self-play (?). In this paper, we apply a similar but fully generic algorithm, which we call AlphaZero, to the games of chess and shogi as well as Go, without any additional domain knowledge except the rules of the game, demonstrating that a general-purpose reinforcement learning algorithm can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance across many challenging domains.
paras.zh: 人工智能的一个长期目标是创建能够从基本原理自行学习的程序（?）。最近，AlphaGo Zero 算法通过使用深度卷积神经网络（?, ?）表示围棋知识，仅通过自我对弈的强化学习进行训练（?），在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们应用了一个类似但完全通用的算法，称为 AlphaZero，应用于国际象棋、将棋以及围棋，除了游戏规则外没有任何额外的领域知识，证明了一个通用的强化学习算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过零基础学习实现超人类表现。

paras.en: A landmark for artificial intelligence was achieved in 1997 when Deep Blue defeated the human world champion (?). Computer chess programs continued to progress steadily beyond human level in the following two decades. These programs evaluate positions using features handcrafted by human grandmasters and carefully tuned weights, combined with a high-performance alpha-beta search that expands a vast search tree using a large number of clever heuristics and domain-specific adaptations. In the Methods we describe these augmentations, focusing on the 2016 Top Chess Engine Championship (TCEC) world-champion Stockfish (?); other strong chess programs, including Deep Blue, use very similar architectures (?, ?).
paras.zh: 人工智能的一个里程碑是在 1997 年，当时深蓝击败了人类世界冠军（?）。在接下来的二十年里，计算机象棋程序继续稳步超越人类水平。这些程序使用由人类特级大师手工设计的特征和精心调整的权重来评估局面，并结合高性能的 alpha-beta 搜索，该搜索使用大量巧妙的启发式和领域特定调整来扩展庞大的搜索树。在方法部分，我们描述了这些增强，重点关注 2016 年 Top Chess Engine Championship (TCEC) 世界冠军 Stockfish（?）；其他强大的象棋程序，包括深蓝，使用非常相似的架构（?, ?）。

paras.en: Shogi is a significantly harder game, in terms of computational complexity, than chess (?, ?): it is played on a larger board, and any captured opponent piece changes sides and may subsequently be dropped anywhere on the board. The strongest shogi programs, such as Computer Shogi Association (CSA) world-champion Elmo, have only recently defeated human champions (?). These programs use a similar algorithm to computer chess programs, again based on a highly optimised alpha-beta search engine with many domain-specific adaptations.
paras.zh: 将棋在计算复杂度上比国际象棋难得多（?, ?）：它在更大的棋盘上进行，任何被捕获的对手棋子都会改变阵营，随后可以放在棋盘上的任何位置。最强的将棋程序，如 Computer Shogi Association (CSA) 世界冠军 Elmo，直到最近才击败人类冠军（?）。这些程序使用与计算机象棋程序类似的算法，同样基于高度优化的 alpha-beta 搜索引擎，并带有许多领域特定的调整。

paras.en: Go is well suited to the neural network architecture used in AlphaGo because the rules of the game are translationally invariant (matching the weight sharing structure of convolutional networks), are defined in terms of liberties corresponding to the adjacencies between points on the board (matching the local structure of convolutional networks), and are rotationally and reflectionally symmetric (allowing for data augmentation and ensembling). Furthermore, the action space is simple (a stone may be placed at each possible location), and the game outcomes are restricted to binary wins or losses, both of which may help neural network training.
paras.zh: 围棋非常适合 AlphaGo 中使用的神经网络架构，因为游戏规则是平移不变的（匹配卷积网络的权重共享结构），根据棋盘上点之间的邻接关系定义气（匹配卷积网络的局部结构），并且是旋转和反射对称的（允许数据增强和集成）。此外，动作空间很简单（可以在每个可能的位置放置棋子），游戏结果仅限于二元胜负，这两者都可能有助于神经网络训练。

paras.en: Chess and shogi are, arguably, less innately suited to AlphaGo’s neural network architectures. The rules are position-dependent (e.g. pawns may move two steps forward from the second rank and promote on the eighth rank) and asymmetric (e.g. pawns only move forward, and castling is different on kingside and queenside). The rules include long-range interactions (e.g. the queen may traverse the board in one move, or checkmate the king from the far side of the board). The action space for chess includes all legal destinations for all of the players’ pieces on the board; shogi also allows captured pieces to be placed back on the board. Both chess and shogi may result in draws in addition to wins and losses; indeed it is believed that the optimal solution to chess is a draw (?, ?, ?).
paras.zh: 国际象棋和将棋可以说天生不太适合 AlphaGo 的神经网络架构。规则是位置相关的（例如，兵可以从第二排向前移动两步，并在第八排升变）且不对称的（例如，兵只能向前移动，王车易位在王翼和后翼不同）。规则包括长程交互（例如，后可以在一步内穿越棋盘，或从棋盘远端将死王）。国际象棋的动作空间包括棋盘上所有玩家棋子的所有合法目标位置；将棋还允许将捕获的棋子放回棋盘。国际象棋和将棋除了胜负外还可能产生和棋；事实上，人们认为国际象棋的最优解是和棋（?, ?, ?）。

paras.en: The AlphaZero algorithm is a more generic version of the AlphaGo Zero algorithm that was first introduced in the context of Go (?). It replaces the handcrafted knowledge and domain-specific augmentations used in traditional game-playing programs with deep neural networks and a tabula rasa reinforcement learning algorithm.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 算法是 AlphaGo Zero 算法的更通用版本，后者最初是在围棋背景下引入的（?）。它用深度神经网络和零基础强化学习算法取代了传统游戏程序中使用的精心设计的知识和领域特定增强。

paras.en: Instead of a handcrafted evaluation function and move ordering heuristics, AlphaZero utilises a deep neural network (𝐩,v)=fθ​(s)𝐩𝑣subscript𝑓𝜃𝑠(\mathbf{p},v)=f_{\theta}(s) with parameters θ𝜃\theta. This neural network takes the board position s𝑠s as an input and outputs a vector of move probabilities 𝐩𝐩\mathbf{p} with components pa=P​r​(a|s)subscript𝑝𝑎𝑃𝑟conditional𝑎𝑠p_{a}=Pr(a|s) for each action a𝑎a, and a scalar value v𝑣v estimating the expected outcome z𝑧z from position s𝑠s, v≈𝔼​[z|s]𝑣𝔼delimited-[]conditional𝑧𝑠v\approx\mathbb{E}[z|s]. AlphaZero learns these move probabilities and value estimates entirely from self-play; these are then used to guide its search.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 没有使用手工设计的评估函数和走法排序启发式，而是利用了一个深度神经网络 (𝐩,v)=fθ(s)，参数为 θ。该神经网络以棋盘位置 s 作为输入，输出一个走法概率向量 𝐩，其分量 pa=Pr(a|s) 对应每个动作 a，以及一个标量值 v，估计从位置 s 出发的期望结果 z，即 v≈𝔼[z|s]。AlphaZero 完全从自我对弈中学习这些走法概率和价值估计；然后使用它们来指导其搜索。

paras.en: Instead of an alpha-beta search with domain-specific enhancements, AlphaZero uses a general-purpose Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm. Each search consists of a series of simulated games of self-play that traverse a tree from root sr​o​o​tsubscript𝑠𝑟𝑜𝑜𝑡s_{root} to leaf. Each simulation proceeds by selecting in each state s𝑠s a move a𝑎a with low visit count, high move probability and high value (averaged over the leaf states of simulations that selected a𝑎a from s𝑠s) according to the current neural network fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta}. The search returns a vector π𝜋\mathbf{\pi} representing a probability distribution over moves, either proportionally or greedily with respect to the visit counts at the root state.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 没有使用带有领域特定增强的 alpha-beta 搜索，而是使用了一个通用的蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 算法。每次搜索由一系列模拟的自我对弈游戏组成，这些游戏从根节点 sroot 遍历树到叶子节点。每次模拟通过在当前神经网络 fθ 的指导下，在每个状态 s 中选择一个访问次数低、走法概率高且价值高（根据从 s 选择 a 的模拟的叶子状态的平均值）的走法 a 进行。搜索返回一个向量 π，表示走法上的概率分布，根据根状态的访问次数按比例或贪婪地选择。

paras.en: The parameters θ𝜃\theta of the deep neural network in AlphaZero are trained by self-play reinforcement learning, starting from randomly initialised parameters θ𝜃\theta. Games are played by selecting moves for both players by MCTS, at∼𝝅tsimilar-tosubscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝝅𝑡a_{t}\sim\boldsymbol{\pi}_{t}. At the end of the game, the terminal position sTsubscript𝑠𝑇s_{T} is scored according to the rules of the game to compute the game outcome z𝑧z: −11-1 for a loss, 00 for a draw, and +11+1 for a win. The neural network parameters θ𝜃\theta are updated so as to minimise the error between the predicted outcome vtsubscript𝑣𝑡v_{t} and the game outcome z𝑧z, and to maximise the similarity of the policy vector 𝐩tsubscript𝐩𝑡\mathbf{p}_{t} to the search probabilities 𝝅tsubscript𝝅𝑡\boldsymbol{\pi}_{t}. Specifically, the parameters θ𝜃\theta are adjusted by gradient descent on a loss function l𝑙l that sums over mean-squared error and cross-entropy losses respectively,
paras.zh: AlphaZero 中深度神经网络的参数 θ 通过自我对弈强化学习进行训练，从随机初始化的参数 θ 开始。游戏通过 MCTS 为双方选择走法进行，at∼πt。游戏结束时，根据游戏规则对终止位置 sT 进行评分，计算游戏结果 z：-1 表示输，0 表示和，+1 表示赢。神经网络参数 θ 被更新，以最小化预测结果 vt 与游戏结果 z 之间的误差，并最大化策略向量 pt 与搜索概率 πt 的相似性。具体来说，参数 θ 通过梯度下降法在损失函数 l 上进行调整，该损失函数包括均方误差和交叉熵损失，

paras.en: where c𝑐c is a parameter controlling the level of L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} weight regularisation. The updated parameters are used in subsequent games of self-play.
paras.zh: 其中 c 是控制 L2 权重正则化水平的参数。更新后的参数用于后续的自我对弈游戏。

paras.en: The AlphaZero algorithm described in this paper differs from the original AlphaGo Zero algorithm in several respects.
paras.zh: 本文描述的 AlphaZero 算法与原始的 AlphaGo Zero 算法在几个方面有所不同。

paras.en: AlphaGo Zero estimates and optimises the probability of winning, assuming binary win/loss outcomes. AlphaZero instead estimates and optimises the expected outcome, taking account of draws or potentially other outcomes.
paras.zh: AlphaGo Zero 估计并优化获胜概率，假设二元胜负结果。AlphaZero 则估计并优化期望结果，考虑和棋或其他潜在结果。

paras.en: The rules of Go are invariant to rotation and reflection. This fact was exploited in AlphaGo and AlphaGo Zero in two ways. First, training data was augmented by generating 8 symmetries for each position. Second, during MCTS, board positions were transformed using a randomly selected rotation or reflection before being evaluated by the neural network, so that the Monte-Carlo evaluation is averaged over different biases. The rules of chess and shogi are asymmetric, and in general symmetries cannot be assumed. AlphaZero does not augment the training data and does not transform the board position during MCTS.
paras.zh: 围棋的规则对旋转和反射是不变的。这一事实在 AlphaGo 和 AlphaGo Zero 中以两种方式被利用。首先，训练数据通过为每个位置生成 8 个对称变换来增强。其次，在 MCTS 期间，棋盘位置在输入神经网络之前会使用随机选择的旋转或反射进行变换，以便蒙特卡洛评估在不同偏差上取平均。国际象棋和将棋的规则是不对称的，通常不能假设对称性。AlphaZero 不增强训练数据，也不在 MCTS 期间变换棋盘位置。

paras.en: In AlphaGo Zero, self-play games were generated by the best player from all previous iterations. After each iteration of training, the performance of the new player was measured against the best player; if it won by a margin of 55%percent5555\% then it replaced the best player and self-play games were subsequently generated by this new player. In contrast, AlphaZero simply maintains a single neural network that is updated continually, rather than waiting for an iteration to complete. Self-play games are generated by using the latest parameters for this neural network, omitting the evaluation step and the selection of best player.
paras.zh: 在 AlphaGo Zero 中，自我对弈游戏由之前所有迭代中的最佳玩家生成。每次训练迭代后，新玩家的表现与最佳玩家进行比较；如果它以 55% 的胜率获胜，则取代最佳玩家，随后由这个新玩家生成自我对弈游戏。相比之下，AlphaZero 简单地维护一个持续更新的单一神经网络，而不是等待迭代完成。自我对弈游戏通过使用该神经网络的最新参数生成，省略了评估步骤和最佳玩家的选择。

paras.en: AlphaGo Zero tuned the hyper-parameter of its search by Bayesian optimisation. In AlphaZero we reuse the same hyper-parameters for all games without game-specific tuning. The sole exception is the noise that is added to the prior policy to ensure exploration (?); this is scaled in proportion to the typical number of legal moves for that game type.
paras.zh: AlphaGo Zero 通过贝叶斯优化调整其搜索的超参数。在 AlphaZero 中，我们对所有游戏重用相同的超参数，无需针对特定游戏进行调整。唯一的例外是添加到先验策略中以确保探索的噪声（?）；该噪声根据该游戏类型的典型合法走法数量进行缩放。

paras.en: Like AlphaGo Zero, the board state is encoded by spatial planes based only on the basic rules for each game. The actions are encoded by either spatial planes or a flat vector, again based only on the basic rules for each game (see Methods).
paras.zh: 与 AlphaGo Zero 一样，棋盘状态仅基于每个游戏的基本规则通过空间平面进行编码。动作也仅基于每个游戏的基本规则通过空间平面或扁平向量进行编码（见方法部分）。

paras.en: We applied the AlphaZero algorithm to chess, shogi, and also Go. Unless otherwise specified, the same algorithm settings, network architecture, and hyper-parameters were used for all three games. We trained a separate instance of AlphaZero for each game. Training proceeded for 700,000 steps (mini-batches of size 4,096) starting from randomly initialised parameters, using 5,000 first-generation TPUs (?) to generate self-play games and 64 second-generation TPUs to train the neural networks.111The original AlphaGo Zero paper used GPUs to train the neural networks. Further details of the training procedure are provided in the Methods.
paras.zh: 我们将 AlphaZero 算法应用于国际象棋、将棋以及围棋。除非另有说明，所有三种游戏使用相同的算法设置、网络架构和超参数。我们为每种游戏训练了一个单独的 AlphaZero 实例。训练进行了 700,000 步（小批量大小为 4,096），从随机初始化的参数开始，使用 5,000 个第一代 TPU（?）生成自我对弈游戏，以及 64 个第二代 TPU 训练神经网络。¹ 训练过程的更多细节在方法部分提供。

paras.en: We evaluated the fully trained instances of AlphaZero against Stockfish, Elmo and the previous version of AlphaGo Zero (trained for 3 days) in chess, shogi and Go respectively, playing 100 game matches at tournament time controls of one minute per move. AlphaZero and the previous AlphaGo Zero used a single machine with 4 TPUs. Stockfish and Elmo played at their strongest skill level using 64 threads and a hash size of 1GB. AlphaZero convincingly defeated all opponents, losing zero games to Stockfish and eight games to Elmo (see Supplementary Material for several example games), as well as defeating the previous version of AlphaGo Zero (see Table 1).
paras.zh: 我们评估了完全训练的 AlphaZero 实例，分别与国际象棋的 Stockfish、将棋的 Elmo 以及围棋的先前版本 AlphaGo Zero（训练了 3 天）进行对战，在锦标赛时间控制下每步一分钟进行 100 局比赛。AlphaZero 和之前的 AlphaGo Zero 使用一台带有 4 个 TPU 的机器。Stockfish 和 Elmo 以最强技能水平运行，使用 64 个线程和 1GB 哈希大小。AlphaZero 令人信服地击败了所有对手，对 Stockfish 零负，对 Elmo 八负（参见补充材料中的几个示例对局），并击败了先前版本的 AlphaGo Zero（见表 1）。

paras.en: We also analysed the relative performance of AlphaZero’s MCTS search compared to the state-of-the-art alpha-beta search engines used by Stockfish and Elmo. AlphaZero searches just 80 thousand positions per second in chess and 40 thousand in shogi, compared to 70 million for Stockfish and 35 million for Elmo. AlphaZero compensates for the lower number of evaluations by using its deep neural network to focus much more selectively on the most promising variations – arguably a more “human-like” approach to search, as originally proposed by Shannon (?). Figure 2 shows the scalability of each player with respect to thinking time, measured on an Elo scale, relative to Stockfish or Elmo with 40ms thinking time. AlphaZero’s MCTS scaled more effectively with thinking time than either Stockfish or Elmo, calling into question the widely held belief (?, ?) that alpha-beta search is inherently superior in these domains.333The prevalence of draws in high-level chess tends to compress the Elo scale, compared to shogi or Go.
paras.zh: 我们还分析了 AlphaZero 的 MCTS 搜索与 Stockfish 和 Elmo 使用的先进 alpha-beta 搜索引擎的相对性能。AlphaZero 在国际象棋中每秒仅搜索 8 万个位置，在将棋中每秒 4 万个，而 Stockfish 为 7000 万，Elmo 为 3500 万。AlphaZero 通过使用其深度神经网络更选择性地关注最有希望的变化来补偿较少的评估次数——这可以说是更“类人”的搜索方法，最初由香农提出（?）。图 2 显示了每个玩家在思考时间方面的可扩展性，以 Elo 等级分衡量，相对于思考时间 40ms 的 Stockfish 或 Elmo。AlphaZero 的 MCTS 在思考时间上的可扩展性优于 Stockfish 或 Elmo，这质疑了广泛持有的信念（?, ?），即在这些领域中 alpha-beta 搜索本质上是优越的。³

paras.en: Finally, we analysed the chess knowledge discovered by AlphaZero. Table Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm analyses the most common human openings (those played more than 100,000 times in an online database of human chess games (?)). Each of these openings is independently discovered and played frequently by AlphaZero during self-play training. When starting from each human opening, AlphaZero convincingly defeated Stockfish, suggesting that it has indeed mastered a wide spectrum of chess play.
paras.zh: 最后，我们分析了 AlphaZero 发现的国际象棋知识。表 1 分析了最常见的人类开局（在人类国际象棋对局在线数据库中下过超过 100,000 次的开局（?））。这些开局中的每一个都被 AlphaZero 在自我对弈训练中独立发现并频繁使用。当从每个人类开局开始时，AlphaZero 令人信服地击败了 Stockfish，表明它确实掌握了广泛的国际象棋玩法。

full.sec: Anatomy of a Computer Chess Program
full.secZh: 计算机国际象棋程序剖析

paras.en: In this section we describe the components of a typical computer chess program, focusing specifically on Stockfish (?), an open source program that won the 2016 TCEC computer chess championship. For an overview of standard methods, see (?).
paras.zh: 在本节中，我们描述典型计算机国际象棋程序的组成部分，特别关注 Stockfish（?），一个赢得 2016 年 TCEC 计算机国际象棋锦标赛的开源程序。关于标准方法的概述，请参见（?）。

paras.en: Each position s𝑠s is described by a sparse vector of handcrafted features ϕ​(s)italic-ϕ𝑠\phi(s), including midgame/endgame-specific material point values, material imbalance tables, piece-square tables, mobility and trapped pieces, pawn structure, king safety, outposts, bishop pair, and other miscellaneous evaluation patterns. Each feature ϕisubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑖\phi_{i} is assigned, by a combination of manual and automatic tuning, a corresponding weight wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} and the position is evaluated by a linear combination v​(s,w)=ϕ​(s)⊤​w𝑣𝑠𝑤italic-ϕsuperscript𝑠top𝑤v(s,w)=\phi(s)^{\top}w. However, this raw evaluation is only considered accurate for positions that are “quiet”, with no unresolved captures or checks. A domain-specialised quiescence search is used to resolve ongoing tactical situations before the evaluation function is applied.
paras.zh: 每个局面 s 由手工特征 ϕ(s) 的稀疏向量描述，包括中局/残局特定的子力分值、子力不平衡表、棋子-格子表、机动性和被困棋子、兵结构、王的安全、前哨、象对以及其他杂项评估模式。每个特征 ϕ_i 通过手动和自动调优的组合分配相应的权重 w_i，局面通过线性组合 v(s,w)=ϕ(s)^T w 进行评估。然而，这种原始评估仅对“安静”局面（没有未解决的吃子或将军）被认为是准确的。在应用评估函数之前，使用领域专门的静态搜索来解决持续的战术情况。

paras.en: The final evaluation of a position s𝑠s is computed by a minimax search that evaluates each leaf using a quiescence search. Alpha-beta pruning is used to safely cut any branch that is provably dominated by another variation. Additional cuts are achieved using aspiration windows and principal variation search. Other pruning strategies include null move pruning (which assumes a pass move should be worse than any variation, in positions that are unlikely to be in zugzwang, as determined by simple heuristics), futility pruning (which assumes knowledge of the maximum possible change in evaluation), and other domain-dependent pruning rules (which assume knowledge of the value of captured pieces).
paras.zh: 局面 s 的最终评估通过极小化极大搜索计算，该搜索使用静态搜索评估每个叶节点。Alpha-beta 剪枝用于安全地剪掉任何被另一个变体证明占优的分支。使用期望窗口和主变例搜索实现额外的剪枝。其他剪枝策略包括空着剪枝（假设在不太可能处于逼和局面的局面中，通过简单启发式确定，走一步空着应该比任何变体都差）、无效剪枝（假设知道评估的最大可能变化）以及其他领域相关的剪枝规则（假设知道被吃棋子的价值）。

paras.en: The search is focused on promising variations both by extending the search depth of promising variations, and by reducing the search depth of unpromising variations based on heuristics like history, static-exchange evaluation (SEE), and moving piece type. Extensions are based on domain-independent rules that identify singular moves with no sensible alternative, and domain-dependent rules, such as extending check moves. Reductions, such as late move reductions, are based heavily on domain knowledge.
paras.zh: 搜索通过扩展有希望变体的搜索深度和基于历史、静态交换评估（SEE）以及移动棋子类型等启发式减少无希望变体的搜索深度来聚焦于有希望的变体。扩展基于领域无关的规则，识别没有合理替代的唯一着法，以及领域相关的规则，例如扩展将军着法。缩减，例如晚着法缩减，很大程度上基于领域知识。

paras.en: The efficiency of alpha-beta search depends critically upon the order in which moves are considered. Moves are therefore ordered by iterative deepening (using a shallower search to order moves for a deeper search). In addition, a combination of domain-independent move ordering heuristics, such as killer heuristic, history heuristic, counter-move heuristic, and also domain-dependent knowledge based on captures (SEE) and potential captures (MVV/LVA).
paras.zh: Alpha-beta 搜索的效率关键取决于着法被考虑的顺序。因此，着法通过迭代加深（使用较浅的搜索来为较深的搜索排序着法）进行排序。此外，结合领域无关的着法排序启发式，如杀手启发式、历史启发式、反着法启发式，以及基于吃子（SEE）和潜在吃子（MVV/LVA）的领域相关知识。

paras.en: A transposition table facilitates the reuse of values and move orders when the same position is reached by multiple paths. A carefully tuned opening book is used to select moves at the start of the game. An endgame tablebase, precalculated by exhaustive retrograde analysis of endgame positions, provides the optimal move in all positions with six and sometimes seven pieces or less.
paras.zh: 置换表有助于在通过多条路径到达相同局面时重用值和着法顺序。精心调校的开局库用于在游戏开始时选择着法。残局数据库，通过穷举逆向分析残局局面预先计算，提供所有六子及有时七子或更少局面的最优着法。

paras.en: Other strong chess programs, and also earlier programs such as Deep Blue, have used very similar architectures (?, ?) including the majority of the components described above, although important details vary considerably.
paras.zh: 其他强大的国际象棋程序，以及更早的程序如深蓝，使用了非常相似的架构（?, ?），包括上述大部分组件，尽管重要细节差异很大。

paras.en: None of the techniques described in this section are used by AlphaZero. It is likely that some of these techniques could further improve the performance of AlphaZero; however, we have focused on a pure self-play reinforcement learning approach and leave these extensions for future research.
paras.zh: 本节描述的技术中没有被 AlphaZero 使用的。其中一些技术可能进一步提高 AlphaZero 的性能；然而，我们专注于纯自我对弈强化学习方法，并将这些扩展留给未来研究。

full.sec: Prior Work on Computer Chess and Shogi
full.secZh: 计算机国际象棋与将棋的先前工作

paras.en: In this section we discuss some notable prior work on reinforcement learning in computer chess.
paras.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论计算机国际象棋中强化学习的一些显著先前工作。

paras.en: NeuroChess (?) evaluated positions by a neural network that used 175 handcrafted input features. It was trained by temporal-difference learning to predict the final game outcome, and also the expected features after two moves. NeuroChess won 13% of games against GnuChess using a fixed depth 2 search.
paras.zh: NeuroChess (?) 通过一个使用175个手工特征输入的神经网络评估局面。它通过时序差分学习训练，以预测最终游戏结果，以及两步后的预期特征。NeuroChess 在使用固定深度2搜索的情况下，战胜了 GnuChess 13% 的对局。

paras.en: Beal and Smith applied temporal-difference learning to estimate the piece values in chess (?) and shogi (?), starting from random values and learning solely by self-play.
paras.zh: Beal 和 Smith 应用时序差分学习来估计国际象棋 (?) 和将棋 (?) 中的棋子价值，从随机值开始，仅通过自我对弈学习。

paras.en: KnightCap (?) evaluated positions by a neural network that used an attack-table based on knowledge of which squares are attacked or defended by which pieces. It was trained by a variant of temporal-difference learning, known as TD(leaf), that updates the leaf value of the principal variation of an alpha-beta search. KnightCap achieved human master level after training against a strong computer opponent with hand-initialised piece-value weights.
paras.zh: KnightCap (?) 通过一个使用基于攻击表的神经网络评估局面，该表基于哪些格子被哪些棋子攻击或防守的知识。它通过一种称为 TD(leaf) 的时序差分学习变体训练，该变体更新 alpha-beta 搜索主变线的叶子节点值。KnightCap 在与一个具有手工初始化棋子价值权重的强大计算机对手训练后，达到了人类大师水平。

paras.en: Meep (?) evaluated positions by a linear evaluation function based on handcrafted features. It was trained by another variant of temporal-difference learning, known as TreeStrap, that updated all nodes of an alpha-beta search. Meep defeated human international master players in 13 out of 15 games, after training by self-play with randomly initialised weights.
paras.zh: Meep (?) 通过一个基于手工特征的线性评估函数评估局面。它通过另一种称为 TreeStrap 的时序差分学习变体训练，该变体更新 alpha-beta 搜索的所有节点。Meep 在随机初始化权重的自我对弈训练后，在15局比赛中击败了人类国际大师13局。

paras.en: Kaneko and Hoki (?) trained the weights of a shogi evaluation function comprising a million features, by learning to select expert human moves during alpha-beta serach. They also performed a large-scale optimization based on minimax search regulated by expert game logs (?); this formed part of the Bonanza engine that won the 2013 World Computer Shogi Championship.
paras.zh: Kaneko 和 Hoki (?) 通过在学习 alpha-beta 搜索中选择人类专家走法，训练了一个包含百万特征的将棋评估函数权重。他们还基于由专家对局日志调节的极小极大搜索进行了大规模优化 (?)；这构成了 Bonanza 引擎的一部分，该引擎赢得了2013年世界计算机将棋锦标赛。

paras.en: Giraffe (?) evaluated positions by a neural network that included mobility maps and attack and defend maps describing the lowest valued attacker and defender of each square. It was trained by self-play using TD(leaf), also reaching a standard of play comparable to international masters.
paras.zh: Giraffe (?) 通过一个包含机动性地图以及描述每个格子最低价值攻击者和防守者的攻击和防守地图的神经网络评估局面。它使用 TD(leaf) 通过自我对弈训练，也达到了与国际大师相当的水平。

paras.en: DeepChess (?) trained a neural network to performed pair-wise evaluations of positions. It was trained by supervised learning from a database of human expert games that was pre-filtered to avoid capture moves and drawn games. DeepChess reached a strong grandmaster level of play.
paras.zh: DeepChess (?) 训练了一个神经网络进行局面对比评估。它通过从人类专家对局数据库中进行监督学习训练，该数据库经过预过滤以避免吃子走法和和棋。DeepChess 达到了强大的特级大师水平。

paras.en: All of these programs combined their learned evaluation functions with an alpha-beta search enhanced by a variety of extensions.
paras.zh: 所有这些程序都将它们学到的评估函数与 alpha-beta 搜索相结合，并辅以各种扩展。

paras.en: An approach based on training dual policy and value networks using AlphaZero-like policy iteration was successfully applied to improve on the state-of-the-art in Hex (?).
paras.zh: 一种基于使用类似 AlphaZero 的策略迭代训练双策略和价值网络的方法被成功应用于改进 Hex (?) 的最新技术水平。

paras.en: For at least four decades the strongest computer chess programs have used alpha-beta search (?, ?). AlphaZero uses a markedly different approach that averages over the position evaluations within a subtree, rather than computing the minimax evaluation of that subtree. However, chess programs using traditional MCTS were much weaker than alpha-beta search programs, (?, ?); while alpha-beta programs based on neural networks have previously been unable to compete with faster, handcrafted evaluation functions.
paras.zh: 至少四十年来，最强的计算机国际象棋程序一直使用 alpha-beta 搜索（?, ?）。AlphaZero 采用了一种截然不同的方法，它平均子树内的局面评估值，而不是计算该子树的极小极大评估值。然而，使用传统 MCTS 的国际象棋程序远弱于 alpha-beta 搜索程序（?, ?）；而基于神经网络的 alpha-beta 程序此前也无法与更快的、手工设计的评估函数竞争。

paras.en: AlphaZero evaluates positions using non-linear function approximation based on a deep neural network, rather than the linear function approximation used in typical chess programs. This provides a much more powerful representation, but may also introduce spurious approximation errors. MCTS averages over these approximation errors, which therefore tend to cancel out when evaluating a large subtree. In contrast, alpha-beta search computes an explicit minimax, which propagates the biggest approximation errors to the root of the subtree. Using MCTS may allow AlphaZero to effectively combine its neural network representations with a powerful, domain-independent search.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 使用基于深度神经网络的非线性函数逼近来评估局面，而不是典型国际象棋程序中使用的线性函数逼近。这提供了更强大的表示能力，但也可能引入虚假的近似误差。MCTS 对这些近似误差进行平均，因此在评估大型子树时，这些误差往往会相互抵消。相比之下，alpha-beta 搜索计算显式的极小极大值，这会将最大的近似误差传播到子树的根节点。使用 MCTS 可能使 AlphaZero 能够有效地将其神经网络表示与强大的、领域无关的搜索结合起来。

paras.en: The input features describing the position, and the output features describing the move, are structured as a set of planes; i.e. the neural network architecture is matched to the grid-structure of the board.
paras.zh: 描述位置的输入特征和描述走法的输出特征被组织为一组平面；即神经网络架构与棋盘的网格结构相匹配。

paras.en: AlphaZero is provided with perfect knowledge of the game rules. These are used during MCTS, to simulate the positions resulting from a sequence of moves, to determine game termination, and to score any simulations that reach a terminal state.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 拥有对游戏规则的完美知识。这些规则在 MCTS 过程中用于模拟一系列走法后的局面、判断游戏是否结束，并对任何达到终局的模拟进行评分。

paras.en: Knowledge of the rules is also used to encode the input planes (i.e. castling, repetition, no-progress) and output planes (how pieces move, promotions, and piece drops in shogi).
paras.zh: 规则知识也用于编码输入平面（例如王车易位、重复局面、无进展）和输出平面（例如棋子移动、升变、将棋中的棋子打入）。

paras.en: The typical number of legal moves is used to scale the exploration noise (see below).
paras.zh: 合法走法的典型数量用于缩放探索噪声（见下文）。

paras.en: Chess and shogi games exceeding a maximum number of steps (determined by typical game length) were terminated and assigned a drawn outcome; Go games were terminated and scored with Tromp-Taylor rules, similarly to previous work (?).
paras.zh: 国际象棋和将棋中超过最大步数（由典型对局长度决定）的对局被终止并判为和棋；围棋对局被终止并使用 Tromp-Taylor 规则评分，与先前工作类似（?）。

paras.en: AlphaZero did not use any form of domain knowledge beyond the points listed above.
paras.zh: AlphaZero 没有使用除上述几点之外的任何形式的领域知识。

paras.en: In this section we describe the representation of the board inputs, and the representation of the action outputs, used by the neural network in AlphaZero. Other representations could have been used; in our experiments the training algorithm worked robustly for many reasonable choices.
paras.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了AlphaZero中神经网络使用的棋盘输入表示和动作输出表示。也可以使用其他表示；在我们的实验中，训练算法对许多合理的选择都表现稳健。

paras.en: The input to the neural network is an N×N×(M​T+L)𝑁𝑁𝑀𝑇𝐿N\times N\times(MT+L) image stack that represents state using a concatenation of T𝑇T sets of M𝑀M planes of size N×N𝑁𝑁N\times N. Each set of planes represents the board position at a time-step t−T+1,…,t𝑡𝑇1…𝑡t-T+1,...,t, and is set to zero for time-steps less than 1. The board is oriented to the perspective of the current player. The M𝑀M feature planes are composed of binary feature planes indicating the presence of the player’s pieces, with one plane for each piece type, and a second set of planes indicating the presence of the opponent’s pieces. For shogi there are additional planes indicating the number of captured prisoners of each type. There are an additional L𝐿L constant-valued input planes denoting the player’s colour, the total move count, and the state of special rules: the legality of castling in chess (kingside or queenside); the repetition count for that position (3 repetitions is an automatic draw in chess; 4 in shogi); and the number of moves without progress in chess (50 moves without progress is an automatic draw). Input features are summarised in Table S1.
paras.zh: 神经网络的输入是一个N×N×(M​T+L)的图像堆栈，通过拼接T组M个大小为N×N的平面来表示状态。每组平面表示时间步t−T+1,…,t的棋盘位置，对于小于1的时间步则设为零。棋盘朝向当前玩家的视角。M个特征平面由指示玩家棋子存在的二元特征平面组成，每种棋子类型一个平面，以及第二组指示对手棋子存在的平面。对于将棋，还有额外的平面指示每种类型捕获的棋子数量。还有L个常数值输入平面，表示玩家颜色、总移动次数以及特殊规则的状态：国际象棋中王车易位的合法性（王翼或后翼）；该位置的重复次数（国际象棋中3次重复为自动和棋；将棋中为4次）；以及国际象棋中无进展的移动次数（50步无进展为自动和棋）。输入特征总结于表S1。

paras.en: A move in chess may be described in two parts: selecting the piece to move, and then selecting among the legal moves for that piece. We represent the policy π​(a|s)𝜋conditional𝑎𝑠\pi(a|s) by a 8×8×7388738\times 8\times 73 stack of planes encoding a probability distribution over 4,672 possible moves. Each of the 8×8888\times 8 positions identifies the square from which to “pick up” a piece. The first 56 planes encode possible ‘queen moves’ for any piece: a number of squares [1..7]delimited-[]1..7[1..7] in which the piece will be moved, along one of eight relative compass directions {N,N​E,E,S​E,S,S​W,W,N​W}𝑁𝑁𝐸𝐸𝑆𝐸𝑆𝑆𝑊𝑊𝑁𝑊\{N,NE,E,SE,S,SW,W,NW\}. The next 8 planes encode possible knight moves for that piece. The final 9 planes encode possible underpromotions for pawn moves or captures in two possible diagonals, to knight, bishop or rook respectively. Other pawn moves or captures from the seventh rank are promoted to a queen.
paras.zh: 国际象棋中的一步棋可以分为两部分：选择要移动的棋子，然后选择该棋子的合法走法。我们将策略π(a|s)表示为一个8×8×73的平面堆栈，编码了4,672种可能走法的概率分布。每个8×8位置标识要“拿起”棋子的格子。前56个平面编码任何棋子的可能‘后走法’：棋子将移动的格子数[1..7]，沿八个相对指南方向之一{N,NE,E,SE,S,SW,W,NW}。接下来8个平面编码该棋子的可能马走法。最后9个平面编码兵移动或吃子的可能升变，在两个可能的对角线上，分别变为马、象或车。从第七横排的其他兵移动或吃子则升变为后。

paras.en: The policy in shogi is represented by a 9×9×139991399\times 9\times 139 stack of planes similarly encoding a probability distribution over 11,259 possible moves. The first 64 planes encode ‘queen moves’ and the next 2 moves encode knight moves. An additional 64+264264+2 planes encode promoting queen moves and promoting knight moves respectively. The last 7 planes encode a captured piece dropped back into the board at that location.
paras.zh: 将棋中的策略表示为一个9×9×139的平面堆栈，类似地编码了11,259种可能走法的概率分布。前64个平面编码‘后走法’，接下来2个平面编码马走法。额外的64+2个平面分别编码升变后的后走法和升变后的马走法。最后7个平面编码在该位置打入捕获的棋子。

paras.en: The policy in Go is represented identically to AlphaGo Zero (?), using a flat distribution over 19×19+11919119\times 19+1 moves representing possible stone placements and the pass move. We also tried using a flat distribution over moves for chess and shogi; the final result was almost identical although training was slightly slower.
paras.zh: 围棋中的策略表示与AlphaGo Zero相同，使用一个平坦分布，覆盖19×19+1种走法，代表可能的落子和虚手。我们也尝试在国际象棋和将棋中使用平坦分布；最终结果几乎相同，尽管训练稍慢。

paras.en: The action representations are summarised in Table S2. Illegal moves are masked out by setting their probabilities to zero, and re-normalising the probabilities for remaining moves.
paras.zh: 动作表示总结于表S2。非法走法通过将其概率设为零并重新归一化剩余走法的概率来屏蔽。

paras.en: During training, each MCTS used 800 simulations. The number of games, positions, and thinking time varied per game due largely to different board sizes and game lengths, and are shown in Table S3. The learning rate was set to 0.2 for each game, and was dropped three times (to 0.02, 0.002 and 0.0002 respectively) during the course of training. Moves are selected in proportion to the root visit count. Dirichlet noise Dir​(α)Dir𝛼\text{Dir}(\alpha) was added to the prior probabilities in the root node; this was scaled in inverse proportion to the approximate number of legal moves in a typical position, to a value of α={0.3,0.15,0.03}𝛼0.30.150.03\alpha=\{0.3,0.15,0.03\} for chess, shogi and Go respectively. Unless otherwise specified, the training and search algorithm and parameters are identical to AlphaGo Zero (?).
paras.zh: 在训练过程中，每个 MCTS 使用了 800 次模拟。每局游戏的棋局数、局面数和思考时间因棋盘大小和游戏长度不同而有所差异，具体见表 S3。每个游戏的学习率设为 0.2，并在训练过程中三次降低（分别降至 0.02、0.002 和 0.0002）。落子根据根节点访问次数按比例选择。在根节点的先验概率中添加了 Dirichlet 噪声 Dir(α)，该噪声与典型局面中合法落子的大致数量成反比缩放，对于国际象棋、将棋和围棋，α 值分别为 {0.3, 0.15, 0.03}。除非另有说明，训练和搜索算法及参数与 AlphaGo Zero (?) 相同。

paras.en: During evaluation, AlphaZero selects moves greedily with respect to the root visit count. Each MCTS was executed on a single machine with 4 TPUs.
paras.zh: 在评估过程中，AlphaZero 根据根节点访问次数贪婪地选择落子。每个 MCTS 在配备 4 个 TPU 的单台机器上执行。

paras.en: To evaluate performance in chess, we used Stockfish version 8 (official Linux release) as a baseline program, using 64 CPU threads and a hash size of 1GB.
paras.zh: 为了评估国际象棋中的表现，我们使用 Stockfish 版本 8（官方 Linux 版本）作为基线程序，采用 64 个 CPU 线程和 1GB 哈希大小。

paras.en: To evaluate performance in shogi, we used Elmo version WCSC27 in combination with YaneuraOu 2017 Early KPPT 4.73 64AVX2 with 64 CPU threads and a hash size of 1GB with the usi option of EnteringKingRule set to NoEnteringKing.
paras.zh: 为了评估将棋中的表现，我们使用 Elmo 版本 WCSC27 结合 YaneuraOu 2017 Early KPPT 4.73 64AVX2，采用 64 个 CPU 线程和 1GB 哈希大小，并将 usi 选项 EnteringKingRule 设置为 NoEnteringKing。

paras.en: We evaluated the relative strength of AlphaZero (Figure 1) by measuring the Elo rating of each player. We estimate the probability that player a𝑎a will defeat player b𝑏b by a logistic function p​(a​ defeats ​b)=11+exp(celo(e(b)−e(a))p(a\text{ defeats }b)=\frac{1}{1+\exp{(c_{\mathrm{elo}}(e(b)-e(a))}}, and estimate the ratings e​(⋅)𝑒⋅e(\cdot) by Bayesian logistic regression, computed by the BayesElo program (?) using the standard constant celo=1/400subscript𝑐elo1400c_{\mathrm{elo}}=1/400. Elo ratings were computed from the results of a 1 second per move tournament between iterations of AlphaZero during training, and also a baseline player: either Stockfish, Elmo or AlphaGo Lee respectively. The Elo rating of the baseline players was anchored to publicly available values (?).
paras.zh: 我们通过测量每个玩家的 Elo 等级分来评估 AlphaZero（图 1）的相对强度。我们通过逻辑函数 p(a 击败 b)=1/(1+exp(c_elo(e(b)-e(a)))) 估计玩家 a 击败玩家 b 的概率，并通过贝叶斯逻辑回归估计等级分 e(·)，由 BayesElo 程序（?）使用标准常数 c_elo=1/400 计算。Elo 等级分是根据 AlphaZero 在训练过程中迭代之间每秒一步的锦标赛结果以及基线玩家（分别为 Stockfish、Elmo 或 AlphaGo Lee）计算得出。基线玩家的 Elo 等级分锚定到公开可用的值（?）。

paras.en: We also measured the head-to-head performance of AlphaZero against each baseline player. Settings were chosen to correspond with computer chess tournament conditions: each player was allowed 1 minute per move, resignation was enabled for all players (-900 centipawns for 10 consecutive moves for Stockfish and Elmo, 5% winrate for AlphaZero). Pondering was disabled for all players.
paras.zh: 我们还测量了 AlphaZero 与每个基线玩家的直接对决表现。设置选择为对应计算机象棋锦标赛条件：每个玩家允许每分钟一步，所有玩家启用认输（Stockfish 和 Elmo 连续 10 步落后 900 分，AlphaZero 胜率低于 5%）。所有玩家禁用思考。

paras.en: In this section we include 10 example games played by AlphaZero against Stockfish during the 100 game match using 1 minute per move.
paras.zh: 本节包含 AlphaZero 与 Stockfish 在 100 局比赛中（每步 1 分钟）的 10 个示例对局。
